title: Maximum Product Subarray
problem_statement: Given an integer array nums, find the contiguous subarray within the array that has the largest product and return that product.

examples.explanation: Zero resets the product; the best product is 0.

intuition: Track both the maximum and minimum products ending at each index because a negative number can swap them.

approaches.name: Maintain Max and Min
approaches.description: Update the current maximum and minimum products at each position and use them to compute the result.

interview_qa.q: Why keep both max and min products?
interview_qa.a: A negative number can turn the current minimum product into the maximum, so both must be tracked.

interview_qa.q: How does zero affect the scan?
interview_qa.a: Zero resets the running products, so the algorithm effectively starts a new subarray after any zero.
